# kCTFontFeatureSelectorNameKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontFeatureSelectorNameKey ](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeatureselectornamekey)

-  kCTFontFeatureSelectorNameKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontFeatureSelectorNameKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontFeatureSelectorNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfeatureselectornamekey#Discussion)

Key to be used with a selector dictionary to get the localized name string for the selector as a `CFStringRef` object.
